one_time_description: Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: First Nation operates Muskoday Store and Gas Bar Limited Partnership, Muskoday Economic Development Authority Limited Partnership, Crossing Island Holdings Inc. TLE Trust holds 6,650 acres of land purchased under Treaty Land Entitlement Agreement. Pension contributions of $549,823 in 2024. Gas bar experienced fuel leak contaminated site remediation ongoing. Treaty Benefit Claim against Government of Canada in progress.
notes: Comparative figures for 2023 have been restated per Note 21 (restatement details not fully disclosed in provided text). Six entities consolidated including store/gas bar LP, TLE Trust, Crossing Island Holdings, Economic Development LP, Fire Department. No GBEs under modified equity method. Net debt position of $289,685 at year end (compared to net financial assets of $1,640,698 prior year). Long-term debt covenant non-compliance noted - financial statements filed after 150-day deadline. Deferred revenue of $9.6M largely from ISC capital projects and CFS funding. Internally restricted CFS Demo surplus of $2,245,991. TLE Trust restricted investments of $4,288,747. Pension contributions $549,823. Gas bar contaminated site remediation ongoing with $128,100 accrual. Province is Saskatchewan (Treaty 6 Territory, Saskatoon area).
